name: Christmas Card via USO
subject: Help send holiday joy to heroes serving overseas
body:
Honor their sacrifice this holiday season by signing our card

USO Supporter,
Christmas is just around the corner -- yet thousands of our service men and women are deployed around the world defending our freedoms, our country, our lives while the rest of us celebrate.
**[Please add your name to our Christmas card for our nation's heroes today.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JW-RkPcx/c2tmMzdzQjBwK3VxdDdoU3hMdHp6RVdhc0Z0YUpaSGJ1cm5VNDR1bmZRbWlqREg3bmIrSG5ob0lKOFJpbWxnRXFnTkE2M2xWSy9tWGxkSHdYeFRxOHhVYWNRVmY5eTVlREJLVmNKdEVmZUU9S0/dHpTQlphRkVXWUoyNlpWRlRjWWNsT08rekI1V3VJcWJqdUhaL2RWaWVvRDJDdWYzV01Bd2QvZXF5aFBmZUt2RUJHNXNGL3BYZnpBS1ZvWkJ1SFI3MDQ5OVlpeWRoaHdWS0)** When home and loved ones couldn't feel farther away, your show of appreciation for their service and sacrifice means so much more.
**[SIGN THE CARD NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBjb4~0fx/c2tmMzdzQjBwK3VxdDdoU3hMdHp6RVdhc0Z0YUpaSGJ1cm5VNDR1bmZRbWlqREg3bmIrSG5ob0lKOFJpbWxnRXFnTkE2M2xWSy9tWGxkSHdYeFRxOHhVYWNRVmY5eTVlREJLVmNKdEVmZUU9S0/dHpTQlphRkVXWUoyNlpWRlRjWWNsT08rekI1V3VJcWJqdUhaL2RWaWVvRDJDdWYzV01Bd2QvZXF5aFBmZUt2RUJHNXNGL3BYZnpBS1ZvWkJ1SFI3MDQ5OVlpeWRoaHdWS0)**
---
Right now, we still need 47,894 more military supporters to add their name to our holiday card so we can reach 100,000 signatures by Christmas. And it looks like we're still waiting on your name.
**Please consider adding your name to our Christmas card today.** Few days are harder for service members than the holidays they must spend on active-duty deployment instead of home with their loved ones.
**[Can we count on you now? Sign the USO's official holiday card to thank our heroes today. ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JW-RkPcx/c2tmMzdzQjBwK3VxdDdoU3hMdHp6RVdhc0Z0YUpaSGJ1cm5VNDR1bmZRbWlqREg3bmIrSG5ob0lKOFJpbWxnRXFnTkE2M2xWSy9tWGxkSHdYeFRxOHhVYWNRVmY5eTVlREJLVmNKdEVmZUU9S0/dHpTQlphRkVXWUoyNlpWRlRjWWNsT08rekI1V3VJcWJqdUhaL2RWaWVvRDJDdWYzV01Bd2QvZXF5aFBmZUt2RUJHNXNGL3BYZnpBS1ZvWkJ1SFI3MDQ5OVlpeWRoaHdWS0)**
Knowing they have your support and appreciation will make the holidays a little brighter for all our heroes in uniform serving around the world.
Thank you for supporting our troops,
The USO

name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW LIMITED CIGAR RELEASE "The Garand"
body:
THE GARAND

Introducing The Garand — a limited-release salute to American grit and battlefield glory from Patriot Cigar Company.

Hand-rolled in a commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand stands tall like the legendary rifle it’s named after — a symbol of strength, precision, and American might. Expertly crafted with 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco and finished in a rich Habano wrapper, this cigar delivers a smooth, medium-strength profile that fires off bold flavor with every draw — steady, confident, and unmistakably patriotic.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=9b967771aa&e=fbf55fa623

This is a STRICTLY limited release.
When The Garand is gone — it’s gone. No restock. No second run.

Lock, load, and light up history.

About The Garand

The Garand from Patriot Cigar Company is more than a premium hand-rolled cigar — it is a cigar built in tribute to the rifle that helped secure victory for freedom across the world: the M1 Garand, the rifle General George S. Patton famously called “the greatest battle implement ever devised.”

A commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand is rolled with precision and reverence, echoing the engineering excellence of its namesake. Packed with 7-year aged Nicaraguan filler and binder, and clad in a beautifully finished Habano wrapper, this cigar offers a confidently smooth medium-strength profile — a slow-burning, dignified smoke with depth, refinement, and authority. It is rich without being overpowering, balanced yet bold, a cigar built for those who honor legacy as much as flavor.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A Tribute to a Legend
------------------------------------------------------------

Adopted by the U.S. military in 1936 and carried proudly through World War II and the Korean War, the M1 Garand was the first standard-issue semi-automatic battle rifle in the world — a game-changer in combat. Where other nations’ soldiers still chambered rounds by hand, American troops were able to fire shot after shot with speed and reliability. It was rugged. It was accurate. It was trusted in the mud, the snow, the jungles, and the beaches of Normandy. It represented innovation, confidence, and overwhelming American firepower.

The M1 Garand wasn’t just a rifle — it was a handheld symbol of American dominance and ingenuity, a lifeline to soldiers whose courage reshaped history.
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Cigar Worthy of the Name
------------------------------------------------------------

The spirit of that legendary rifle lives in this limited-edition release:
* 7.5 x 48 Churchill — a proud, commanding presence
* 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco — matured for depth and character
* Habano wrapper — warm, rich, and worthy of a namesake of warfighters
* Medium strength — a long, thoughtful smoke that marches forward with confidence

This cigar is meant to be enjoyed the way history is remembered — deliberately, with pride, and without rush.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A One-Time Tribute
------------------------------------------------------------

Like the heroes who carried the M1 across the world, The Garand will not be mass-produced or remade. This is a strictly limited release — when this cigar is gone, it’s gone. No second run. No encore.

Light one in honor of the warriors who stood between tyranny and liberty — and for the enduring American spirit that still refuses to yield.

The Garand
A rifle that won wars.
A cigar that honors the warrior.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY
USE PROMO CODE
FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
eagle
Shop Now 20% OFF CIGARS (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=c44221ba42&e=fbf55fa623)

** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=71ffd5671b&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=af8d929938&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=0e912b645e&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=2a8579eb90&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=3288f481a4&e=fbf55fa623

name: Senate Defenders Team
subject: This affects your Defender membership, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

Friends, When I went to college, I played Division One soccer. It was super competitive and some of the most fun I’ve ever had. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121418253/589396766/873665722?&refcode=E16758-20251216-Soccer-Image-CandidateBio&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2E5YmI5My1kZGRhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6iUpeSL0AXSq4qq-oWqJVy_FV9VQ_BOkFspUvMLsYs=) In soccer, you learn when to play offense and when to play defense. If you’re down by a point, you take risks and take your shot. If you’re ahead, you fight like hell to defend your lead. **Democrats spend way too much time on defense when we should be playing offense. We need to kick the ball towards the goal or we’re never going to win.** That is exactly how I deal with Donald Trump. I go on offense against this guy. Because if he is going to try to take shots at me, he better be ready to play ball. clean_body: ⚽ ⚽ ⚽ | = Friends, When I went to college, I played Division One soccer. It was super competitive and some of the most fun I’ve ever had. = In soccer, you learn when to play offense and when to play defense. If you’re down by a point, you take risks and take your shot. If you’re ahead, you fight like hell to defend your lead. Democrats spend way too much time on defense when we should be playing offense. We need to kick the ball towards the goal or we’re never going to win. That is exactly how I deal with Donald Trump. I go on offense against this guy. name: AOC
subject: The Big Money Playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Just look at what Republicans have been doing in Congress.
They have been voting to advance cuts on hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and Social Security **so that they can give it to the billionaires who elected them** , in the form of tax cuts and sweetheart government contracts to companies like SpaceX.
They know that it is deeply unpopular. They know that it hurts you.
But they are not here to serve us. They are here to serve themselves and the billionaires who have paid them. **Oligarchy**.
They know that the only chance they have to get away with such an unpopular agenda — to get away with stealing in plain view — is to stoke deep divisions among us along lines of race, identity, and culture to keep us distracted.
This has been the Big Money Playbook — not just now, but for generations.
And that is why **Donald Trump is not an aberration**.
He is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate and dark money.
And if we are here to defeat him, **we must defeat the system that created him**.
**That means that we choose to out-organize the oligarchy**. We will, and we must, do away with the power of big money in our politics.
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? Every dollar helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251216.b21xYQ&refcode=em20251216-10412-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10412%2E2526796%2EudWJrz)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251216.b21xYQ&refcode=em20251216-10412-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10412%2E2526796%2EudWJrz)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251216?refcode=em20251216-10412-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10412_2526796_udWJrz&akid=10412%2E2526796%2EudWJrz)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251216-10412-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10412%2E2526796%2EudWJrz)**

They have been voting to advance cuts on hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and Social Security so that they can give it to the billionaires who elected them , in the form of tax cuts and sweetheart government contracts to companies like SpaceX. They know that it is deeply unpopular. They know that it hurts you. But they are not here to serve us. They are here to serve themselves and the billionaires who have paid them. Oligarchy. They know that the only chance they have to get away with such an unpopular agenda — to get away with stealing in plain view — is to stoke deep divisions among us along lines of race, identity, and culture to keep us distracted. This has been the Big Money Playbook — not just now, but for generations. And that is why Donald Trump is not an aberration. He is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate and dark money. And if we are here to defeat him, we must defeat the system that created him. That means that we choose to out-organize the oligarchy. We will, and we must, do away with the power of big money in our politics. More soon, Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

**Multiple Arizona Republican lawmakers were scheduled to attend an event this week hosted by Republicans for National Renewal (RNR)** — a far-right organization whose founder is an administrator of a Telegram chat that includes self-identified neo-Nazis. The Arizona GOP is hoping you're not paying attention as they align themselves with the most extreme right-wing political agenda in modern American history. **[We need to make sure everyone knows exactly what's happening, and we need your help getting the message out to hold AZ Republicans accountable:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121418344/589398791/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUwMWU2MDktZGVkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BUHzWgymByFyfHEgz22M2S-jj-OyG3VfCKALlvgY63w=)** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121418345/589398792/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUwMWU2MDktZGVkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BUHzWgymByFyfHEgz22M2S-jj-OyG3VfCKALlvgY63w=)
---
The "Christmas Crusade" event was hosted by Republicans for National Renewal, whose founder previously hosted a podcast called "Blood Soil and Liberty" — an explicit reference to Nazi Germany. The group's executive director was a VIP guest at white nationalist Nick Fuentes' conference.
**Arizona GOP lawmakers listed as attendees included Senate President Warren Petersen and State Rep. Alexander Kolodin, Republican candidate for Secretary of State.**
After the AZ Mirror reported on the event, promotional materials were deleted, and lawmakers claimed they didn't know about the extremist ties.
_But this wasn't the first time_. RNR has held similar events in Arizona since 2021, where attendees yelled racial and homophobic slurs. Last year, Kolodin attended alongside RNR's leadership.
[**Your support helps us expose this extremism and hold Republicans accountable. When Arizona voters know who these GOP lawmakers really are and what they stand for, we win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121418346/589398793/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUwMWU2MDktZGVkYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BUHzWgymByFyfHEgz22M2S-jj-OyG3VfCKALlvgY63w=)

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: They knew he'd fail and voted for him anyway
body:
Plus: Rob Reiner tragedy and Ford's $19.5 billion surrender | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ed07ba4cf0&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | This episode is packed! We got our hands on the post-election polling data that reveals exactly why Keller won ([spoiler: it's not because voters believe in him](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fc912ae48d&e=567664f14c)).

We're also covering the heartbreaking Rob Reiner story, a CBS ambush on Erica Kirk that had us furious, Ford surrendering on electric trucks to the tune of $19.5 billion, and an inspiring Heisman speech from Fernando Mendoza. Let's get into it.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a67e21461f&e=567664f14c)
| |
**🔥 THE POLLING DATA IS IN — AND IT'S WORSE THAN WE THOUGHT**
We finally have answers on what voters were thinking in the mayor's race. One number tells the whole story: 59%.
When you see what that 59% represents — and what Keller's own voters said about his chances of actually improving anything — you'll understand exactly where we are as a country.
We break down every number in the episode.

**⚠️ WHAT THIS MEANS FOR 2026 AND 2028**
The generic ballot numbers for governor are brutal. And nationally, something interesting is happening — MAGA identification among Republicans just dropped 7 points.
Mark Halperin is backing off his JD Vance prediction. Ted Cruz is making moves. Josh Hawley just did something that has Trump's advisors furious.
We explain what's shifting and why.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9f8f5c8cdb&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**😢 ROB REINER — A TRAGIC LOSS**
The Rob Reiner situation is heartbreaking. We go through what happened, what led up to it, and why this is a tragedy that transcends politics.
We also take a moment to appreciate his legendary filmography — his first seven movies will remind you just how talented he was.

**😡 CBS AMBUSHES CHARLIE KIRK'S WIDOW**
Bari Weiss was supposed to bring balance to CBS. Then she pulled this.
We show you the clip. Mark called it "right out of Maury Povich." When you see who they brought on and what they asked Erica Kirk to do, you'll understand why we're so frustrated.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f31cf33691&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**🚗 FORD SURRENDERS ON ELECTRIC TRUCKS**
Ford just took a $19.5 billion loss and killed their electric F-150. The CEO's quote says it all — and it's a lesson in what happens when government tries to force the market.
---
|
---

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=28e60a3aed&e=567664f14c)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Tonight’s midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My campaign is coming up on an important mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
My campaign is coming up on an important mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and there are two big reasons I need your help today:
1. Meeting this goal will set us up to have strong numbers on our next fundraising report, which will become public after the end of this month.

2. I don’t take a _dime_ from corporate PACs or lobbyists. Never have, never will. This movement is powered by grassroots donations, and our average online contribution this year is just $25.88.

With the midterms around the corner, it’s important that we show the strength of our people-powered movement.
**So Peter, can I count on you to chip in at the link below to help us meet our mid-month goal before midnight tonight?**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20251216**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251216.2JyYkQ&refcode=em20251216-5714&t=1&akid=5714%2E420207%2EpVH7Vk)
Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support,
Pramila Jayapal

name: SarahMcBride.com
subject: $6,500 short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Time is running out.
#
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re asking you to [**donate to help us reach our $12,000 goal.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251216-1.f0I_l0&refcode=em20251216-2589&t=1&akid=2589%2E21716%2ELij2Rn)
Here’s why:
1️⃣ **Our FEC fundraising deadline for 2025 is on December 31.** In just a couple of weeks, Sarah will be legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers for the _**last time**_ before the midterm election cycle begins. If we post a strong report, it’ll show national Republicans that people in Delaware and across the country are ready to re-elect Sarah and take back the House.
2️⃣ **Our average email donation is just around $18.** Sarah relies on grassroots donations to keep her focused on fighting for us in Congress, holding this administration accountable, and making sure Democrats regain a majority in the House — _not stuck on the phone dialing for dollars._
3️⃣ **Time is running out to reach our goal.** We have just a few hours left, and right now we’re still **$6,500 behind.**
That's why we're asking: [**If you’re in a position to do so, can you pitch in $18 or even $1 to support Sarah and help us reach our goal?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251216-1.f0I_l0&refcode=em20251216-2589&t=2&akid=2589%2E21716%2ELij2Rn)

Thank you!
Team McBride

Peter,
When MAGA electeds aren’t attacking our rights, they’re hurting our pocketbooks.
Senate Republicans voted down legislation to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits [https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/senate-rejects-plans-to-address-sharp-rise-in-health-care-premiums] on Thursday, meaning that millions across the country will now see a steep increase in their healthcare costs at the start of next year.
There’s no excuse for this. What we’re seeing is a complete disregard for working-class families. Literal lives are at stake. NOW is the time to pool our resources and electorally fight back.
DONATE to TOP PAC if you agree Texans of all walks of life deserve accessible, affordable healthcare. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=0c9cfbf3-e0da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]

2026 is right around the corner, Peter. Midterms will be here before we know it, and we’re already putting pieces in place to hit the ground running in the new year.
Your contribution provides us with the fuel we need to engage and electorally mobilize more Texans on issues that impact ALL of us, such as healthcare.
PITCH IN $5, $15, $25 or any amount you can to boost our get-out-the-vote work in next year’s elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=0c9cfbf3-e0da-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Winning a healthier, more vibrant Texas will take time and effort, but with your continued support, we’ll get there. Together, let’s keep building a future where ALL Texans – no matter our age, race, faith, gender, or background – have a chance to live full lives and thrive.
– Texas Organizing Project PAC

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Fear is contagious, but so is courage
body:
---
Derek, President Trump recently threatened me, and five of my colleagues — all because he didn’t like what we said in a video, where we reminded members of the military of our laws and the oath we all took to our Constitution. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251216_5553_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5553_22930333__ExCB7&akid=5553%2E22930333%2E_ExCB7) What’s most telling is that the president considers it punishable by death for us to restate the law. And now, Trump’s Department of Defense has announced it is investigating me for “misconduct.” But as a veteran who loves this country and swore an oath to protect and defend the United States — no threat, intimidation, or call for violence will deter me from that obligation. **This isn’t about me. It’s about who we are as Americans, and the type of country we want to live in.** Fear is contagious, but so is courage. I will not be intimidated by these latest threats, and I hope you’ll stand with me in condemning the president’s calls for prosecution and execution. We must demand better. Thank you, Mark Mark Kelly
U.S. Senator, Arizona **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251216_5553_fr&refcode2=5553_22930333__ExCB7&akid=5553%2E22930333%2E_ExCB7)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

And now, Trump’s Department of Defense has announced it is investigating me for “misconduct.” But as a veteran who loves this country and swore an oath to protect and defend the United States — no threat, intimidation, or call for violence will deter me from that obligation. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Radical Left Lunatic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Here’s what he said:
Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day.
_And last week, he directed one at me._
Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people.
Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too.
**[I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots in whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98493?refcode=em20251216-9838&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9838%2E614464%2EPs8lp2)**
So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me.
He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_
**If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.**
You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me.
**[I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. Split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots if you can, and help me take on Trump and the national GOP.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98493?refcode=em20251216-9838&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9838%2E614464%2EPs8lp2)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Happy Hanukkah!
body:
Light Prevails Over Darkness
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019b29ddbf92-d4004ce5-1ab7-4158-b739-7afcae240a63-000000/F7YqheRMECocm4JiyNaKlKkaCmt56xo75U7Gr8z7law=436)Patriot–From all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action, we would like to wish our Jewish friends a very Happy Hanukkah. Sadly, within our country and around the world, there has been a steep uptick in antisemitism and violence committed against Jewish people. Please know that there are also many of us who stand with you.As you gather to light the menorah, you are celebrating the miracle of faith, perseverance, and the triumph of light over darkness.May this Festival of Lights bring you and your loved one’s peace, joy, and renewed hope. As each candle is lit, may it serve as a reminder of the enduring strength of faith and the blessings of liberty.Wishing you a happy, meaningful, and blessed Hanukkah!In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Buried deep in the Appalachians, a video has exploded online—what it shows is pure nightmare fuel.

These quiet streets hold more than stories—they echo with memories that still haunt locals.

The accounts I’ve heard are unsettling—many who’ve seen it can’t look at this place the same way again.

This isn’t rumor or legend; it’s compelling evidence of something disturbing that demands attention.

After watching, you’ll understand why this story can’t be left in the dark.

[Don’t miss your chance—watch now before it’s gone.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=d188394eeedb4b749af46c8ea6a9f5f4&_e=ng6hqnbTFTfsSrD-G7BRQdaUg6Rv-pCdUFAcQAOcVe8OpszWGiweHYcKv7gk7lbHGBMZ-n73G_f9p_U0ItPKMhfHzC_-absqO_rw3ZZdzUUSIlgEKuSgSMYks1DIHEdE0I1tvl0XwglwMngsy_prqdQWGQ8OexLosdJMfwNYGFpF5By8Y2u0WqmwrguSckIgIifKgzqypq8hhIEzlx0qM3yQc1tBZ1Lb6qt4dzXJEfUQ7HkadpqIV4izoB0yaySKvKrRhgr1r1gKlheEeyEhfbHV9ZURJ_ErTr2QMh0TVsy2ovgG4BSzpZ4N31AWzrjfLv87PFLLwdslCAXM5FCgkBW8zQzbSJdNsYyH9rlmijX0bL69GUVpTJ72lVDcp6tVq9eVIQ-PrtCBbkEfz00N-OB0GbVg1BL84KYSFfH6S44p_Zdd7Yo1uUR9mLEMx4LPIA_8IQfSy9hgZPi3eF0xb-C3Uu2yhpu6Txc-8ktnFXP3k7mNiJTrSn2h5WdeKk8_luoSk3BRVX_9jXwdjC5P-yDwMmb8Sn5Rb_Bv7dNfieo33TdbRltWKC5Lsbg_qKZ9mHvAS6isw_MKHRqvbop1yw%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Should you wish to stop receiving emails from us, you can unsubscribe at any time by . If you wish to unsubscribe from this offer, please **. This editorial email containing advertisements was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you have shown an interest in Financial Education topics. To ensure our emails continue reaching your inbox, please add our email address to your address book. Stark Media LLC appreciates your feedback and inquiries. However, please note that by law we are unable to provide individualized advice. | Unauthorized replication Stark Media LLC, duplication, or dissemination of our content, either entirely or partially, is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from Stark Media LLC. We appreciate your adherence to our intellectual property rights. If you require assistance, you can reach us via email at mailto:support@yourcapitalminds.com "support@yourcapitalminds.com". We are here to assist you at all times. We are located at 222 Delaware St, Ste 2071, New Castle, DE 19720.© 2025 Your Capital Minds. Аll rights reserved.

# The GRINDR Bill?
### Why are conservatives linking arms with GRINDR and Pornhub?
| | | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Dec 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
Important interview!
Today I got to dig into the truth about the _App Store Accountability Act_ that:
* Does NOT protect children...
* Does NOT empower parents...
* **Does protect Grindr, Meta, every app - a huge win for Big Tech!**
* Does create a gateway to Digital ID for EVERY American!

[Watch the interview here and share far and wide](https://substack.com/redirect/42b0dcc8-fef6-40df-a66a-6f5f5ddbe646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):

Does create a gateway to Digital ID for EVERY American! : | | ---|---|--- Cheers, Brian (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: The one event Charlie loved most...
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---

_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---

This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Peter, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---

They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

**[You can be the reason a future leader walks into AmFest this December — instead of staying home wondering if they’re alone in this fight.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SjxbQ0JQGJ_ppSS0w017Hv0VFvnWRTfa5CSfseFjbsLbMA6N5t1w-ITVrHhESKX8239dK_dDuUFK5URSajfmORcMi2YzMnCdgOSe7u_ZLVQOca1bzpN2HMndbg-oYE2P6U8F-0bI2Ys8cdFy8QD7wKlYrn5N_kO1oqr_GKnAbUz-9uDUsRFoFpqztZTpFf1FzDjLlozTx7mNi8UxhC3LicsRQj7OVnM6JcptNnP2nhx_znEaj2COAnL1Xp7f9l29Lz_udQLWRSGae8QSMQmn1vydwJKBE_hdqk0DZNhUWVTh8MrIWBm7MZpe4WoQMQ4ffEnj6zwBLzJIyTQDZhY2Wsx15PvZJS8RarFj30MAVn3lqIbEJaakpXXvVimqlR-KxRT2fNeNhlvAdNcQt7Z1uudnaSJ2fq52n5zRVmz5i51kkAQuD3Tk73uogJcaYkblaH8DOk7H8MKYcc0MWdKvznAuoTeou_0Ghsf6Fu_Cd8tysEz0MncXB1uxd4ECag9YBbpTf9edqHB-dgbrATwdb3zpF-6FgVSata36iFIsauBIJ6lxFgn26tANuleVbp72qutK2GKkVAhAdhkiyp2Hs05BEv_Gt-YwTVzzNJSvczPmtDGPzRyteMRhHfdx2nD4h73kStXw2kw1PxYSMe2qXjihAqu3EQn-0P-OMJ_JQrUkcF2VBIfB5Jiq0HbQZAhgxbT07UpO4_aLq0yhc0OYWv7eiVBCaa0ePjoVAAoTsNymRZXSbiEOtaq0nFKBKOwx1DWVUs2xNgjW0xNAwDV32XmO3L-qnG65MiCPuO7OaM4MK9_s0KqIw6MaTxcUO_SulNhbhDu-rEvf4CY7JwMilsfeuL9wlwb3Da3mjVBhzHsGYA8uLe5janQHYVysOuS-N3k9RasQED7ne5CwYg6ItMc/XGhwgDa5-QFEg2YF6q4kvumIqBv7Bkw4/15)**

Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

[**A young patriot who could be the next leader, the next fighter, the next firebrand that helps save this country.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/l9rzIh-LxAr_2goI2Ls8A9lekTCTjRODKDdc6fzUq4zH2YPi4PJ543dAOgwnhcqyK_3Ir3aB5U-hI0-UYm9CnXxscPhW4ElqC7AnmtcNgpBRHme9LA6BJdWxlt_kNJC52nVdZXsnj8vZj1N04IHKJtTA0GVDx7JOXXl60iXvnsZfVdkVhU0WD_luyk38fVyH3AYFNvHlFQth1cXuLkxfYp5V4t7jpoK-TtL-rAbtn_ViEc8HcUocQb8BzQSJEiIik29O63a-bfIbVdYvuk7Ctu4bEurwv5k9R86xkRsiaxdN9sY4dxHdEo1Eh53piC5qXIlicchWOzmOTHIP3AfhmlQheQbcCfqsGMoxGMIDswWxYzfUgvp4tNcd7p8cBoW-iyeTHsIBEdKv6KUZpPjXBngZNaw0xaUYEt0wlJOqXdpmiCIIzri1-WuiR0eqZzr5wTOrbaHfcmR9tlg2foz9med8gxsI5-VALEBTMPq42AWixR787v-J4DCbL87wOVAjHiqFNjd9v08Os2CdD71-hMHf00XNa5jpuW6QDZeAi-7hy3c7Cfe47Le87X2VxqdvI15cC1ZpH-HLEdXJEvCyjq5EQSCx81Nrh02npLf0mLrUwXqjP3peSt64MgtwqOlboPbRE0oyvbsAv2c9GAVDsNEWmz2iAh_puDK5sEp45FGk4DFdQHUnusW7i12UUoDvA_jGTC-DQZ2ErBMGBD9KcKPxC87dPVKLPyDlHCDA5JmZkm-3Chn-yACrxOJ-BBiHnbHiPShJSZhf9kBvQMDXgqKwKVvXKnSQdy_Dl0pqZFxpiS4vGDBzjbh5Vy12JbFA-tzXZiqV02sMLBVfjNLMicenvZu7w8dAKRrmD5-U9KY2bTGYY3E_W-PozROB983WwXj-PTDchcbFmtsRbGMQOKE/9bNIrX1kDf_Ru-KHO6T9zfjnczSsNE7k/15)

Peter, I know what Charlie would want right now.

He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire.

He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks.

Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves.

To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. .

Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December.
---
| | **For Charlie, **

**Lauren Toncich **
Vice President of Events
Turning Point USA

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Peter, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Peter, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

I just had a series of difficult conversations with D.C. leadership and, to be frank, they were distraught. They offered no good news, no solution for the tidal wave of dark money being poured against us. They have me dead to rights, Friend.
You and I both know this isn't about me—it's about whether we get President Trump's mandate through the Senate. If the liberals win this race, his agenda is blocked before it even starts.

I am coming to you now—humbling myself—because you are the only one I trust with this. My campaign cannot survive the deficit we're facing unless we hit this final fundraising goal.

**[I’ve written a private note just for you, detailing exactly what I heard and why I'm so scared. Please, promise me you'll keep this strictly between us. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The Left feared this book
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8amtf5fisfpd05umrd513isnmr8bqef2rkl02jg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjjm0p36cjh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjtv9hqc5bm588dnnnloh0uqk7k88ngk5ho22hj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjjm0p36cjh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9rl0mkb45hmnmbnn6pp5i1hkgjeahk0u4hsagro_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjjm0p36cjh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf23pq2sa9iqmadea60jn8nfp704dflb1de4l2q8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cjjm0p36cjh2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

name: Bone chilling
subject: Boebert believes women are a “lesser vessel”
body:
Women’s rights are under the fiercest attack in half a century, we cannot afford to let Lauren Boebert speak for us.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AB2o4pLUCtygP_Kg5JXpbpUvs477rU6bWXbBz3OARYzvaGDzkB1bwdV4pXtcMbGl7P3cBRvbPQb2YVsoUobyV3-f9kaZfzgl98Uq59V5oTorqo3VMWeTS-sOEHvgWMXcnLcL9VeZT5ACtHhcfyI_onk6IM8Enb52yQV21KnJyNf4Vu_h-RGpEcTTtB0O0aKTihsdFrie93JTdlwZLMdNmk4paSUj3HiV2ZDzaijo7s4=&c=NmaEeNEXyKpOLRN3JYX0McZpySCoDDbwXiqw-HobY0rL8gtBTwNJjw==&ch=jV-7H_dlb94HPcxK82mkXX2cbQDvrDl8GmrzCmPi-Z_qCw6q1ZysZQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert has proudly aligned herself with some of the most extreme MAGA influencers like Andrew Tate, who have built entire platforms on degrading women:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AB2o4pLUCtygP_Kg5JXpbpUvs477rU6bWXbBz3OARYzvaGDzkB1bwdV4pXtcMbGl7P3cBRvbPQb2YVsoUobyV3-f9kaZfzgl98Uq59V5oTorqo3VMWeTS-sOEHvgWMXcnLcL9VeZT5ACtHhcfyI_onk6IM8Enb52yQV21KnJyNf4Vu_h-RGpEcTTtB0O0aKTihsdFrie93JTdlwZLMdNmjH9dakqaoMPz3eedcs6eLI=&c=NmaEeNEXyKpOLRN3JYX0McZpySCoDDbwXiqw-HobY0rL8gtBTwNJjw==&ch=jV-7H_dlb94HPcxK82mkXX2cbQDvrDl8GmrzCmPi-Z_qCw6q1ZysZQ==)
---

Let that sink in. A sitting member of Congress, someone who is supposed to represent women in Colorado's 4th District, believes that we are fundamentally inferior.
This is abhorrent. And it's dangerous.
This is submission to the same twisted ideology that fueled the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. It's the same worldview driving MAGA's nationwide attacks on abortion rights, contraception access, and even protections against workplace discrimination. Boebert herself has even introduced national abortion restrictions so extreme that it would even make IVF illegal.
Women's rights are under the fiercest attack in half a century, we cannot afford to let someone like Lauren Boebert speak for us.
That's why Trisha is running. In Congress, she will be the bulwark against the far-right's crusade to roll back decades of progress and will fight to restore reproductive freedom, to protect women's healthcare, and to ensure that the voices of women in Colorado--and across this country--are never silenced or diminished.
[But we can't do it alone. To take on Boebert and the MAGA billionaires backing her, we need your support. Will you chip in $25, $10, or whatever you can spare today to help send Lauren Boebert packing and make sure women have a real fighter in Washington?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AB2o4pLUCtygP_Kg5JXpbpUvs477rU6bWXbBz3OARYzvaGDzkB1bwdV4pXtcMbGlJ0F7HBor1Qa4Kn9yzVaPIhNde4YYMw74C3O1kVyIZw5LYkXq4YWTMJcwkJJY9w0iq6gDhbPe8w7A_tylt4YaMka35uXaFLmT5tzR8lCD-7d95Fakc9aG-CmxM01ASLx-XLlKbDTflC_69Fiy0jlIH2LLt-JdIOSL2SkjdsCZJ50TzkM11gaZbw==&c=NmaEeNEXyKpOLRN3JYX0McZpySCoDDbwXiqw-HobY0rL8gtBTwNJjw==&ch=jV-7H_dlb94HPcxK82mkXX2cbQDvrDl8GmrzCmPi-Z_qCw6q1ZysZQ==)

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Books, not bombs.
body:
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-uSHzLJlM-wHp5kqhKZoLynNY6TLtl9ZTGnidRa8hy7tRW_Rg11jBbcX26RmPfTqjzk5jKUcvBK_A6Ewzv3EHgreK8JHD1Jf1BeEl_gKtJ1PGuK2gvhb51gWikzDGRGZ1_of19BhRUFMHX4_9nDm_8p_AdENgh3EFQrgjwNG1X1iUSglYs0J2vM2IDdk8eKbqQamLqdiIhBljtT1LCyCsxlO9__yx1TWNbTBRu-wp4o=&c=T6Ofq0H1N8kuKcc9cLobx40rZlczc-FrtoyInk8xtX123_zV-FnKBA==&ch=s63jWI50-keDYElZq-1SZYMpkqVz4jZQvOGTxuFWHUP4dhY72XtkBw==)
---
|
Peter,
Right now, the United States spends $850 billion every year on the military-- while our kids' schools are left scrambling for resources. As Trump slashes education funding and pushes to dismantle the Department of Education, states are being forced to hike property taxes just to fill the gap.
Here in Illinois, we have the highest property taxes in the country -- and still, only 1 in 4 fourth graders are meeting reading standards. In wealthier zip codes, students see far better results, while kids in working-class and low-income communities are left behind. A child's zip code shouldn't determine whether they get a good education. But right now, it does.
That's why when I get to Congress, I'll introduce the Books Not Bombs Act.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-uSHzLJlM-wHp5kqhKZoLynNY6TLtl9ZTGnidRa8hy7tRW_Rg11jBbcX26RmPfTqjzk5jKUcvBK_A6Ewzv3EHgreK8JHD1Jf1BeEl_gKtJ1PGuK2gvhb51gWikzDGRGZ1_of19BhRUFMHX4_9nDm_8p_AdENgh3EFQrgjwNG1X1iUSglYs0J2vM2IDdk8eKbqQamLqdiIhBljtT1LCyCs4MexzJuH5xomn1yqwGR6_E=&c=T6Ofq0H1N8kuKcc9cLobx40rZlczc-FrtoyInk8xtX123_zV-FnKBA==&ch=s63jWI50-keDYElZq-1SZYMpkqVz4jZQvOGTxuFWHUP4dhY72XtkBw==)
---
|
This bill will shift just 1.5% of the Pentagon's budget into public education. That small reallocation would mean a 10% increase in funding for our schools -- enough to ensure every child gets the education they deserve while driving down property taxes and making housing more affordable for homeowners and renters alike.
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education while making life more affordable for working people. This is why Congress needs more school board members in the fight -- people like me, who have seen firsthand how broken our system is and who know how to fix it.
[But I can't do it without you. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters -- not billionaires, not defense contractors. If you believe we need to invest in books, not bombs, can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you spare to send someone with public education experience to Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-uSHzLJlM-wHp5kqhKZoLynNY6TLtl9ZTGnidRa8hy7tRW_Rg11jBbcX26RmPfTqve57TKHXE_b5wjHofqCnGFYRdpwZ6KOYUvCPulavAdbchQVat0THSlJV3JvhXO9ItXWF7SeKJvuYoXn6UoQBZxs9lnC-My5jGIdf6d8cSTqGSO8RLAa-WlpiB5vja_h1O3SOWkV5wOjn6jrG9Mxr5Yla85GQi8T-uEqITtQLcRlPfJ2B0Fad1w==&c=T6Ofq0H1N8kuKcc9cLobx40rZlczc-FrtoyInk8xtX123_zV-FnKBA==&ch=s63jWI50-keDYElZq-1SZYMpkqVz4jZQvOGTxuFWHUP4dhY72XtkBw==)

| When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest.
But at first, Democrats had brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA.
Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware.
Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began.
In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November.
A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for.
We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v2de88g1065LFP4KWFgUMcO8_AEAuPPYtsNRdVKOPHFu4FulaSq2W8Gn2QIVdALJFXqd4EaxOJKgTwYB9VTFVea7WdQ-BlOvL56mOknY99ZWNmt0vdV7WAi49SnkbLs0AO-gLHgJjNsvD4oSvIW2zLBDkrzWhAK7TXP_hW5rANjGpWsA75XTUoSSvgsw6Lq4Jehb3woFiQv7byztX_NnLA==&c=G7EsVyaMt0ak37vpAD-v3YEFvHwWAIqOGUKrYsZrhne9Cb7D_9WtIw==&ch=UGSYM1hihXaf2GRCz0B6w5vNh_98m1Rg5pZWFJsAotq3L2SUI5D7UA==)
---
In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states.
Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors.
Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down.
Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win.
[We need you in this fight to the bitter end. Trump and MAGA are not giving up--in fact, they're mad as hell for the brutal defeat we gave them in PA. clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest. But at first, Democrats had brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA. Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware. Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began. In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November. A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for. We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow. | == In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states. Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors. Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down. Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win. == | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for being in this fight with us to the end. Defend our Courts | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

name: Beth Poole, Evergreen
subject: Let us explain: A winning strategy
body:
2X IMPACT: Your gift matched up to $50,000
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4360439/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

While the Trump regime continues to dismantle federal climate progress, Evergreen isn’t sitting back and waiting for changes in Washington.

We’re pushing for progress where it’s possible–right _now._ That’s always been our North Star: Championing the most ambitious policies that are politically possible at this moment.

The real battle for clean energy has shifted to the states—**and a generous donor has stepped up with a**[**$50,000 matching challenge**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4360440/87SdQ4wZ)**, doubling every dollar donated by****December 31****to accelerate a proven strategy that’s winning today.** Let me explain.

Families across the country are feeling the pinch of rising costs. For too long, they’ve been told that clean energy is expensive.**Evergreen is flipping that script.** We are proving that the path to lower bills runs directly through state-level clean energy deployment.

**This isn’t just rhetoric; it’s a winning strategy.**

This year, we rapidly put together key policies for newly elected governors like Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey and Abigail Spanberger in Virginia, who both secured decisive victories by campaigning on energy affordability.

As they head into office in 2026, **we are handing them the specific, data-backed playbooks to deliver on those promises.**

This is the innovative, results-oriented work that separates us from the pack: we aren't just asking for climate action; we are building the exact policies that will make life more affordable for working families.

[**We need your help to turn these plans into reality in New Jersey, Virginia, and beyond.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4360441/87SdQ4wZ) Fossil fuel interests are already working to block these cost-saving measures, and with the federal government stepping back, the pressure on states to lead has never been higher.

We have the data, but we need resources to build momentum and support for policies we are delivering to leaders. To help us meet this moment, a generous donor has agreed to match every dollar you give, **up to $50,000, before December 31.**

Please, don’t wait. This is your chance to drive climate progress that produces real financial relief for American families, defying the gridlock in Washington. [**Donate $25, $50, or whatever you can today to double your impact and help us build an affordable clean energy future.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4360442/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[MAKE A YEAR-END GIFT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4360443/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| With gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Fundraising Director
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
