name: Bo French
subject: DEI has overtaken the Railroad Commission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Bo French Campaign
body:
Texas energy, at the hands of the Texas Railroad Commission (RRC), is overrun with woke DEI spending.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.bofrench.com/click/e2086965/VaHR0cHM6Ly9ib2ZyZW5jaC5jb20/SZW1haWxzX2JvZnJlbmNoX2NvbTI1MTIxNw/LbmNsbjk0SEc/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uY2xfYW1wbGlmeSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjUxMjE3LTE4JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PW5jbC15eGc2RE43enN5Jl9ubGlkPXl4ZzZETjd6c3kmX25oaWRzPW5jMXFwaFdJOFpybHM/gaULuHQ/s3p2d9087a9)
---
|
---
| | Dear friend,
Texas energy, at the hands of the Texas Railroad Commission (RRC), is overrun with woke DEI spending.
And it happened under the “leadership” of my opponent, Jim Wright.
I’m not exaggerating. The Comptroller’s own data shows that when Wright took office (just four years ago), the RRC _ranked 41st_ in spending based on DEI and affirmative-action criteria.
Now?
_**It’s ranked 9th****.**_
* Higher than every major university, including liberal strongholds like UT.
* Higher than the Commission on the Arts.
* Higher than the Texas House and Senate.

_Under Jim Wright, the Railroad Commission has become a DEI powerhouse._
And you're paying for it with your tax dollars.
When I found out, my jaw dropped.
Which has led me to create a pledge - - when I am Railroad Commissioner, _I will always_ put merit before DEI.
And honestly, I think all of my opponents should sign my pledge, too. Because, win or lose in March, I want to see an end to this nonsense.
[I](https://link.emails.bofrench.)**[f you agree, sign your supporter’s pledge here](https://link.emails.bofrench.)**[. ](https://link.emails.bofrench.)
_By signing this pledge, you’re showing Texas that, regardless of who the next Railroad Commissioner is, DEI has NO place in the Texas government._
---
| | [Watch the Video](https://link.emails.bofrench.)
---
| | Here’s how bad it is:
Nearly**half of all contracts** at the Railroad Commission are awarded based on DEI categories. Not merit, not performance, not what’s best for the industry or the taxpayer.
Even worse?
Last year, the RRC awarded 2,017 contracts. 1,892 of them (_a staggering 94%_) were handed out without competitive bidding.
That means the agency regulating the most important industry in Texas is giving out contracts based on political quotas instead of capability.
My opponent isn’t serving taxpayers.
He isn’t even serving the Texas oil and gas industry... he’s serving the DEI lobby!
_This is why I’m running for Railroad Commissioner._
But I need your help.
**[Sign your citizen’s pledge to End DEI at the Texas Railroad Commission.](https://link.emails.bofrench.)**
If elected, I will put merit first.
I will end the DEI games.
I will demand competitive bidding.
And I will defend the industry that powers our state and our nation.
But I need your help to take the fight to the Austin establishment.
---
| | [Donate Now](https://link.emails.bofrench.)
---
| | The Texas Miracle was built by roughnecks, wildcatters, ranchers, and entrepreneurs - - not DEI.
If we don’t fight back now, we risk losing the industry that defines who we are.
---
| | | [](https://link.emails.bofrench.com/click/e2086965/VaHR0cHM6Ly9ib2ZyZW5jaC5jb20/SZW1haWxzX2JvZnJlbmNoX2NvbTI1MTIxNw/LbmNsbjk0SEc/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uY2xfYW1wbGlmeSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjUxMjE3LTE4JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PW5jbC05RkRXSmFXNmJFJl9ubGlkPTlGRFdKYVc2YkUmX25oaWRzPW5jMXFwaFdJOFpybHM/gaULuHQ/sbga66d6af4)

**Bo French** **Candidate for TX Railroad Commissioner**

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Because if you do ... | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | Do You Bank in Any of these Banks? → | ---|--- | | Do you have any kind of money in the banks on this list? name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: TONIGHT: Join us for our Statewide Member Gathering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Hi Peter, As we close out the year, we’re coming together for one of our favorite traditions — gathering as a Working Families community to reflect, reconnect, and look ahead. **[You’re invited to our PA Working Families Statewide Member Gathering happening TODAY, December 17th, from 6:00-7:30 PM.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeuoY4oxd8u65NblXtq05TlUXPWj1ALmyQamyoWuJukSpw32sWkfholxOioYujCOONlkKsZxZrQLFVWyo5RJr1Nu2Hporo4oNTg4Si5lBb82SLJwN5G85Ul2O9SDnNz73Nrq9IsiACxBlPFsuFeqGwyqwvbu-greY9nFxB6TxwS-xpLQ_PHR31BFApyLqT1l_wnnhp0dvAA2vmo6CyeMRvvcz-14rAg9h1uc7vAyIJBE7DDN5XmaHQuHG97KL1WD--UFXm3b9mPMbuBKsEq-yFNud4zOdGcXTByWanFa_m65/4mi/b_57A1G5QbaCRo9nB59GmA/h0/h001.2FeCUVjwXmTKM7EoByqp6IQTrLSBeYFRJS2YQBG5Sv4)** It’s a virtual space for all of us who believe in a Pennsylvania where working people come first. This hasn’t been an easy year, but you showed up again and again — talking to neighbors, organizing your communities, and helping grow a multiracial, working-class movement. Now we get to take a breath together, share what we’ve built, and imagine what’s possible in 2026. 📅 Date: Wednesday, December 17th
⏰ Time: 6:00-7:30 PM ET
💻 Where: Online (Zoom link sent after RSVP) **[RSVP now](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeuoY4oxd8u65NblXtq05TlUXPWj1ALmyQamyoWuJukSpw32sWkfholxOioYujCOONlkKsZxZrQLFVWyo5RJr1M09fudfoKizUFNDOVX8NWJS4wJm0G6sIjNYrM4cEozf73heb87KubfbQv6RbmKB4QywPcXpJlI4gQ7Kot5etuI7tYlZN5tbRq7jbIGeKtotdpK8fcJrrxVSE7ABZIoN7eneAfBxkkfrNccrtYatUzbkadKw8-fhL5fdyqExFnmp3kI7qQvdESgw76B0W_kqu98-8NaaYVUVy8RSZaorB_i/4mi/b_57A1G5QbaCRo9nB59GmA/h1/h001._6RnTIfXTM1PJfmpkIcf1ouOMuyv1PASia7eBpyn8io)** During the gathering, we’ll: ⭐ Share regional updates from across the state
⭐ Lift up victories and the people who made them possible
⭐ Get grounded in the challenges ahead and how we’re meeting them
⭐ Connect with WFP members who share your commitment to justice and democracy This movement is powered entirely by people like you — your creativity, your courage, and your belief that Pennsylvania can be a place where all of us thrive. We’re grateful for you, and we can’t wait to close out the year together. **[RSVP now to save your spot and receive the Zoom clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, As we close out the year, we’re coming together for one of our favorite traditions — gathering as a Working Families community to reflect, reconnect, and look ahead. It’s a virtual space for all of us who believe in a Pennsylvania where working people come first. This hasn’t been an easy year, but you showed up again and again — talking to neighbors, organizing your communities, and helping grow a multiracial, working-class movement. Now we get to take a breath together, share what we’ve built, and imagine what’s possible in 2026. 📅 Date: Wednesday, December 17th ⏰ Time: 6:00-7:30 PM ET 💻 Where: Online (Zoom link sent after RSVP) During the gathering, we’ll: ⭐ Share regional updates from across the state ⭐ Lift up victories and the people who made them possible ⭐ Get grounded in the challenges ahead and how we’re meeting them ⭐ Connect with WFP members who share your commitment to justice and democracy This movement is powered entirely by people like you — your creativity, your courage, and your belief that Pennsylvania can be a place where all of us thrive. We’re grateful for you, and we can’t wait to close out the year together. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . Did you see this last time? I’ve fought socialism overseas as a Navy SEAL – now Bernie Sanders is backing my far-left opponent to bring it here. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6431a4e24fe94049be99792c7b82834c&_e=H7KHaxwHGG7fc-fOhEYzLUJmQ2kUGCG6BiEn6u2u1I3oY1NfRyNu-KovaIj67OgRPUq1WvUXOJbsUAmMjNFXPHC6mgPO30p5Ldkp-U_pwiej5wXL0ilOEKGSDbTf7dhFx-FQYGDH_qZbqrTyY9LtvSsVxrZDHkWHV2EYDlnp7SNm-4fPu29119sBDcZm9LVQVpV2DtZZX-xQ_-6lNr6tEldAwvhRHNp4bawMYNugx6io78ePUqH1JVbiqNNWxvCksIg97fP7qX20qtsNdHoV_SykqxjO6HqUwF6HWYQvElK2HS6jHRg2BoihnXFEZK69wWLONgtkcdwZWuT7YRH1J3Q1-4Bds14tTgLW1J7ziOa_sOnKJcGe3QQiP5fKu80jTD7Q4ymVYymgZyn7fy4SlfA9htw5_ElqpDfGQcvvZAZY-1uREA3Z-_-y6yhRRj3yFbqjtV4R4_CWp1Zaz3Yr9HRWMW1Fw57rnYrd-NlUjobjtm_ylxRAyCCL93aqXyLhwfZgT7f-ZBQRtA9GDgAG4GfZOUp3ri7JTqp-vvsNU4DncvWb-xEhvZ_Wo2iAh5_2srJhrbCUlRAmCLg4Ku_2vZPoNEp-hUTAYZvG_8k1Upnqa-fT6Dh4KK82D7l06-he5hlwUj9_sP_A299F-uKB4X9HIEmasEG2O73QnCElsG3Dme5i-2f9HxPcIpkerGdbZKAPq1os3qUhPzw6Nm1-e6o_-7FKD52-CfU8Ole4EBayPeK-_lSkcpaJgIpwiSoTle1OVv-7az4-BD6Yw44dXAfi1tF60DCs4pfV00T2xLLFA2IdQD7-mv_xr51OCwDn)

Peter,

A few weeks ago, I reached out about Bernie Sanders – the self-proclaimed democratic socialist – throwing his full endorsement behind Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, his handpicked protégé in our U.S. Senate race.

**[If you missed it or meant to contribute but got busy,](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6431a4e24fe94049be99792c7b82834c&_e=H7KHaxwHGG7fc-fOhEYzLUJmQ2kUGCG6BiEn6u2u1I3oY1NfRyNu-KovaIj67OgRPUq1WvUXOJbsUAmMjNFXPHC6mgPO30p5Ldkp-U_pwiej5wXL0ilOEKGSDbTf7dhFx-FQYGDH_qZbqrTyY9LtvSsVxrZDHkWHV2EYDlnp7SNm-4fPu29119sBDcZm9LVQVpV2DtZZX-xQ_-6lNr6tEldAwvhRHNp4bawMYNugx6io78ePUqH1JVbiqNNWxvCksIg97fP7qX20qtsNdHoV_SykqxjO6HqUwF6HWYQvElJHearAVQozfcKp9ARZdIeWRcpHOMXFoJcxpBo8quxGg13DDn2G2Euu7XBwZDcE0cf7mobVlWz0D9vIKIudLoURfR1zWAMGnTi2c8mraAR-HhwgJR7RW1u1vocltrA1Av9l-b6h8UntNrjUigZHN5Uty2D41OwUPfQ4IrqY3nH4WKZRjGvUti6-2QbRS3cHbCg8htzl2l5v8WEYQCXz5AUdYqFyYsTPF2-fufAhQVvxsVMvh472dT2DXvHdLMnLbJJdq6RvGRl9VQruAUzsynlAlM2Dw7FNIHWoulf55ab-dRrDUBO1PkBmx4K4CewcbuSW_RhRo90F7ZCL3kMm_r_zDVKy3UkzKRxA-0Wd334HaaoARGx-j5kWtWp2pb_PCa87AeYpSJ5eH-IfjwF6Bp8sw6qNrR4YNZaEdnWGIW2dToFdDqte0RBC9uRcMrToLzTV0lhbONgG7_by0DNERKT-pHFMiOY-jACl-gak0EE0djbO_4R65ZNnJ-pK4qDUaZ6KmCSNklNLv0WdHHIoSg2k)** I wanted to follow up because this race is heating up quickly, and we can't let Bernie's political machine steamroll Minnesota.

In his endorsement, Sanders praised Flanagan as the fighter to “stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.”

**Translation:** She's his choice to push government-run healthcare, massive tax hikes on job creators, a crushing minimum wage, and more big-government overreach.

That's the same socialism I battled against in my nine deployments as a Navy SEAL Officer – from combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman to deterring threats in the Middle East and beyond.

**I’ve seen socialism destroy economies up close:** families going hungry under government control, personal initiative crushed by bureaucracy, and freedom sacrificed for empty promises.

_**I risked everything to defend American capitalism – the system that made our country the greatest on Earth.**_

Now, as the underdog Republican with a real shot to flip this Senate seat for the first time in decades, **[I'm asking again: If you believe capitalism is still worth defending, can you invest in our campaign today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6431a4e24fe94049be99792c7b82834c&_e=H7KHaxwHGG7fc-fOhEYzLUJmQ2kUGCG6BiEn6u2u1I3oY1NfRyNu-KovaIj67OgRPUq1WvUXOJbsUAmMjNFXPHC6mgPO30p5Ldkp-U_pwiej5wXL0ilOEKGSDbTf7dhFx-FQYGDH_qZbqrTyY9LtvSsVxrZDHkWHV2EYDlnp7SNm-4fPu29119sBDcZm9LVQVpV2DtZZX-xQ_-6lNr6tEldAwvhRHNp4bawMYNugx6io78ePUqH1JVbiqNNWxvCksIg97fP7qX20qtsNdHoV_SykqxjO6HqUwF6HWYQvElIHNYg23bxNabAZbX-3sVpwbJqfc8ESVn7IkT9p026IrJSFOq0AbF244ZCbW9HhjoS8CNN64Jd5PGrh0B86x0X1GHvW4njgWGkJsjhazXIKjzRH1zY4wzPWOi7iApEOlJbV51iDlbz2uTvsJAhsww525RZ0gandcUM9AUHGqy5v5QrIsN-guDtqRJ-1de_o-KnKpQ2k2YY3fBek31C2h1AwwchIqmy4NjlpqsnA9oKmqJIrJPzHH1GyFqKP8aGeW_kMwDUm2GxUN7-Z-Lb3Zg1ar7n-viWUNdVDhiKTK65sd4-M0WShIAIaDHJ6tsM3eMVr5a5tJljyie500AqRRiRg2g27NLHzIypPyqokvfoIh3dIYXPr-PXux-Y-QvIlWPDBeC2JMQXN0AZ6XK9Pfw9u1-2ImYtaSOaVJnkSEJxxgZmMBa2AEVNkEKWD8CNCQmgtyX9BJaUCnpeg01C-r0D8d_ROw636ICzzGyXdnfNjg0rnMwDr3aoCDz1_ZosMgvGCMjlBpt7beyvY9ujmrw7h)**

**My opponent's record under Tim Walz is clear:**
* She fought to weaken ICE and open our borders – while fentanyl pours in, killing over 1,200 Minnesotans annually.

* With Bernie's full support, she's pushing to nationalize healthcare and tax away our prosperity.

President Trump is already delivering: tariffs on China, secured borders, and energy dominance.

He needs reinforcements in the Senate – warriors like me who've faced real adversaries, not invented them in Washington.

_**I'm Adam Schwarze – Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, and proud capitalist fighter.**_

Recent polls show a Republican within striking distance. But to counter Bernie's hundreds of millions and endless donor list, we need immediate financial firepower.
**_
[Will you step up today with $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can? clean_body: Did you see this last time? I’ve fought socialism overseas as a Navy SEAL – now Bernie Sanders is backing my far-left opponent to bring it here. | Peter, A few weeks ago, I reached out about Bernie Sanders – the self-proclaimed democratic socialist – throwing his full endorsement behind Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, his handpicked protégé in our U.S. Senate race. I wanted to follow up because this race is heating up quickly, and we can't let Bernie's political machine steamroll Minnesota. In his endorsement, Sanders praised Flanagan as the fighter to “stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.” Translation: She's his choice to push government-run healthcare, massive tax hikes on job creators, a crushing minimum wage, and more big-government overreach. That's the same socialism I battled against in my nine deployments as a Navy SEAL Officer – from combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman to deterring threats in the Middle East and beyond. I’ve seen socialism destroy economies up close: families going hungry under government control, personal initiative crushed by bureaucracy, and freedom sacrificed for empty promises. I risked everything to defend American capitalism – the system that made our country the greatest on Earth. Now, as the underdog Republican with a real shot to flip this Senate seat for the first time in decades, Even $5, $10, or $25 makes a huge difference right now. My opponent's record under Tim Walz is clear: She fought to weaken ICE and open our borders – while fentanyl pours in, killing over 1,200 Minnesotans annually. With Bernie's full support, she's pushing to nationalize healthcare and tax away our prosperity. President Trump is already delivering: tariffs on China, secured borders, and energy dominance. He needs reinforcements in the Senate – warriors like me who've faced real adversaries, not invented them in Washington. I'm Adam Schwarze – Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, and proud capitalist fighter. Recent polls show a Republican within striking distance. But to counter Bernie's hundreds of millions and endless donor list, we need immediate financial firepower. Your support today fuels the next wave of American strength and helps bury Bernie's radical agenda right here in Minnesota. In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence only works if the other side knows you'll follow through. Bernie fears a fighter like me in the Senate. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: 90 Sec Message From Rabbi Jonathan Cahn
body:
Rabbi Jonathan Cahn has recorded a 90 second message that you can listen to here: https://youtube.com/shorts/w4r7niRzmxk I want to thank Rabbi Cahn f
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13831.1.d91b6061223c1ad28e6404d5547e95bc) |
---
**Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** has recorded a 90 second message that you can listen to here: [https://youtube.com/shorts/w4r7niRzmxk](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13832.1.6e0fbcb2012b7058b45156c2d115d1e7) I want to thank **Rabbi Cahn** for his endorsement who will also be preaching at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13833.1.e0136d5207ba2f01936c4729d5786db8) on Wednesday, April 8 at 6:30pm in Tulsa! Last spring, I released my first book "[Chasing After The Wind](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13834.1.ee1e20f87d0bc4a25395cfd3650d2c93)" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. _So I did..._ My 2nd book is now **FINISHED**! It's entitled '[DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13835.1.d04d421e0e992d713ca38c169c0b2f06).' **Pastor Paula White-Cain** wrote an _incredible_ Foreword and **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** gave an _amazing_ Endorsement. In this, I open up about _my own personal struggles_ as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live **DIVIDED** forever. As a thank you for your support, I've got a promo code (**SHERIDAN**) that you can use to save 30% off the pre-order at checkout. You can visit: [https://clr.cm/qPKQ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13836.1.3e07f2320259e67b1ced429a1cca31f9)to get your SIGNED copy and start reading immediately with the **FREE e-book** that's included. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Thank you -Pastor JacksonLahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Read "DIVIDED" Now ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13837.1.50ab7c3c50146c7a44a2d65844a95dc9)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26921606.13838.1.55641080a390b49e04886804b8e3afa8)
---
Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be.
---
---
|

clean_body: Rabbi Jonathan Cahn has recorded a 90 second message that you can listen to here: I want to thank Rabbi Cahn f | | | Rabbi Jonathan Cahn has recorded a 90 second message that you can listen to here: I want to thank Rabbi Cahn for his endorsement who will also be preaching at on Wednesday, April 8 at 6:30pm in Tulsa! Last spring, I released my first book "" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. So I did... My 2nd book is now FINISHED! It's entitled '.' Pastor Paula White-Cain wrote an incredible Foreword and Rabbi Jonathan Cahn gave an amazing Endorsement. In this, I open up about my own personal struggles as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live DIVIDED forever. As a thank you for your support, I've got a promo code (SHERIDAN) that you can use to save 30% off the pre-order at checkout. You can visit: get your SIGNED copy and start reading immediately with the FREE e-book that's included. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Thank you -Pastor JacksonLahmeyer | | | Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be. | Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... | | | **This isn't just nonsense, it’s f’d up.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27cIGosQZnwDKkfTDttoAWvAEFMNqgBzaThfUy_q20FIZ413Z6RWb_Wh0L5_jvmiXrXq0mDJXmprwa69bp9OMvwKpbiowEPN4_iGKFH6ryy3yYeM_c_CWty8si50ctULsI2xOfBBammpqDSwxY7sTlqDqeb3jDPA5HZ80UGR5v7Nn3F3RnPvXa8ANpJSh3jgpqGDPiP8E_Or4KBxWTfX-7v5c5P51Hxefl9XLvQk4Wp_ZvKucEVqJ3aeEn_JeTrbLDw/4mi/kqRPVPxORh-SpPURFjlfNw/h0/h001.QtWXS-6Z8gQYq4QzgGwn08lAs30XijPjUzZCXNsD7ec)******[Please chip in whatever you can to help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will STOP this cruel fool!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz83gIjRu7Wbe1oEVMv_AA8gpNfkcVCx2-xx2A2imjQonNgj5Ng0P4cPOJJFWdbZI5YPIq533Dj6Wlgx3ZmrppIrfN2u0h7TdvNYjmE6evH2pV222tOmw_J1Z53U2ph4VDu4clTBYeODOFb9-_KrAulYQxc7LM3RVYczf7yHdDDFyQQo2LKnMAj2l3x2X3PpSrnzNatE_WMDC9VHr8v0MWCnTyjqENQisA19UOaG59KEER8fY3LfgP3Q2NyhZk3ljG84/4mi/kqRPVPxORh-SpPURFjlfNw/h1/h001.-gz8bRbjiN6tJe1cYdc2fTK9zpM-L91Y197SiCO5Clk)**
* * *
**** Trump is arguing that real-time American Sign Language (ASL) interpretation for White House briefings “severely intrudes” on his ability to control his image. _Unbelievable._ This isn't about image control, it's about exclusion and deception. It's a shocking admission that the fundamental rights of Deaf Americans are considered less important than Trump’s deplorable political image. This is a direct attack on dignity, access, and the spirit of the Americans with Disabilities Act. **This is what Able Dems exists to fight. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stand up to these attacks and ensure every American has equal access and a voice.** **[We need champions in office who understand that our rights are non-negotiable. clean_body: | | | This isn't just nonsense, it’s f’d up. Trump is arguing that real-time American Sign Language (ASL) interpretation for White House briefings “severely intrudes” on his ability to control his image. Unbelievable. This isn't about image control, it's about exclusion and deception. It's a shocking admission that the fundamental rights of Deaf Americans are considered less important than Trump’s deplorable political image. This is a direct attack on dignity, access, and the spirit of the Americans with Disabilities Act. This is what Able Dems exists to fight. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stand up to these attacks and ensure every American has equal access and a voice. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump’s. Image. Is. Junk. What he’s really saying is that sign language interpreters hinder his ability to lie to the public. Every dollar helps us put a Democrat who is a true disability advocate on the ballot. ** Thank you for standing with us. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter –
We want to be transparent: heading into the last mid-month deadline of the year , what we raise now will go towards our Fighting For Colorado Listening Tour starting next month.
This isn’t just numbers on a spreadsheet. It’s about what we’ll be able to accomplish in the election year. It’s about the kind of Attorney General Colorado will have in 2026 – someone who will:
→ Protect democracy and voting rights
→ Defend reproductive freedom
→ Stand up to extremism
→ Fight for equal justice and public safety
Every dollar we raise in these final days of 2025 goes directly toward our listening tour and building up the grassroots operation we’ll need to win.
If you’re able, can you chip in today to help pull us even with where we need to be? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251217-email]
Your support keeps this campaign moving forward.
Jena for CO

name: Mark Lamb
subject: My Promise
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. |
---

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c143d9759bb14802a0a2aad61831d740&_e=aiw479NHx2PieJ4fObe_Hr1XkJYvj5RHJ-xrToGIafkwveLzdA6ItDcNV2zXhUI239rOeshL8tgL5c2kavZdtLWaqzoMxHHr9tOLhNhgGv5YtgofVRiXtARohi48YBLOQhjHkoKBJ-MJ8IzYL46FuKanPY81AElqo41Tmn-rr4rCLfFMcID9DhopokwNfDL1mVAu31SsclxFBgMbtvZZnMWXBVP3KPuPmPJkTXx02dJdO9efVjAFkogmydsI__hR9BIPREYKE_iArR_3pRBHLyeek03dACQPRP-HKICw4gVW4OvSaQ_VGoaWe6jnMEtivhF3XH5QQBCF78YYi6lkB44CBljaayworhghhy1nOa6awedZ3B-vuIMXdmyewXCct3pRvelVZ1B8Buz7979ec-vuBkOeF-JKn4yJCoR_qRL3S4FaaFVTGJ3grpZ3jmlW_rq3o9uHGjTlKe9lLM9qwQjPOt6_FNrZ2bUsau2HXHVqrTry-BPJfIUg3clTT9QapJ2Iq_mEFu6F29ws-zcxjUxH13GuzF0kJDdjA8DT_lyTp1REqaXmkDhU9asoHboLvVdVV_O6AxeaRFWZ1ostmBEyxr83t5KmQJPcgHZAdW8XmaOZhjx8V2mao6nLXWMDxtGNUL6Uek_arq8r7tKeRTKEo6neoJxnoONphZ5sygI%3D)

Peter,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c143d9759bb14802a0a2aad61831d740&_e=aiw479NHx2PieJ4fObe_Hr1XkJYvj5RHJ-xrToGIafkwveLzdA6ItDcNV2zXhUI239rOeshL8tgL5c2kavZdtLWaqzoMxHHr9tOLhNhgGv5YtgofVRiXtARohi48YBLOQhjHkoKBJ-MJ8IzYL46FuKanPY81AElqo41Tmn-rr4rCLfFMcID9DhopokwNfDL1mVAu31SsclxFBgMbtvZZnMWXBVP3KPuPmPJkTXx02dIKLj3WQaHszm90mvUFNHHAAwEEaTXJn2HtTY_pP61CEq12UZom87nBKwWnt6Nf6-E093er9xtoZfmYuNi521rygRwub1Tfde8BpZ6rwKbro4A60uH1iJRxLOc8qDRUmPwaB1RCWamKUFMAweEqgrj0SNFLOw5Nh7kdS0Ab1q2Usv7DNicFHZZWgGFl5H2ZAjv0WVOEdaqMGZjzGgc4erSO_dJxLnyd7-k4A23Ij7Kfdd_Ob42ye8KlXDy-kqcf3qGe-JWlbM5hzwUogS6_bL4l0O-RsNoUzwY2vvWzMXdqG2KUhMW5sEbs0yCXeDlgByIzEsXHj6xCm5XVfY5IjWle9Is0pU5Ciycb67r2u2b3Ee_lxTANxcyiC-ERprzYfPdoqrs-APXR07M-wWEunCOeiD85pJ2FLSCKpUorJJnXG0zRc0i0ANwoqu4dAvztQas%3D)**

**[Grassroots supporters are the backbone of this campaign. clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Peter, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

subject: Republicans have a White Nationalist problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
These are the people driving policy at a national level right now
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2004%2E791427%2EPew7Yx)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251217-1-180&t=2&akid=2004%2E791427%2EPew7Yx)
Friend — This is the Republican party.
When one of their Senators says “Islam is not a religion”, nobody steps up to disavow them.
Nobody steps up to disagree with his calls to deport all Muslims from the US, even the millions who were born here.
These are the people driving policy at a national level right now. Senators like Tommy Tuberville. House Reps. like Randy Fine. Administration officials like Stephen Miller. All led by their Muslim-banning, immigrant-bashing President.
**The Republican Party has a White Nationalist problem.**
And the only way to deal with a White Nationalist problem is to crush their political movement with the weight of democratic mass mobilization.
Because the truth is that a vast majority of Americans do not share these extremist views. In fact, they are repulsed by them.
So, if you believe that America is a place where everyone belongs, no matter their religion, **[chip in $10 to help us fight back.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251217-1-180&t=3&akid=2004%2E791427%2EPew7Yx)
If you want to see racists like Tommy Tuberville and Randy Fine relegated to a small minority in Congress, **[chip in $10 to help us fight back.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251217-1-180&t=4&akid=2004%2E791427%2EPew7Yx)
If you are ready to unify this country, not against immigrants, but against the immense power and wealth of the billionaire class, **[chip in $10 to help us fight back. Every dollar counts when we bring together a grassroots movement of millions of people who chip in what they can.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251217-1-180&t=5&akid=2004%2E791427%2EPew7Yx)

Ilhan Omar

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/17/2025
body:
What Xcel promised regulators and what customers were told before Dec. 17 shutoff warnings
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** New filings raised transparency questions over what Xcel told regulators about [planned power shutoffs](https://link.email.joinrmv.) versus what customers were warned before Dec. 17 outages. President [Trump also blasted Gov. Jared Polis](https://link.email.joinrmv.) for keeping Tina Peters jailed despite his announced pardon, drawing renewed national attention to the case. Public safety concerns deepened as [six women sued Hinge over ignored warnings](https://link.email.joinrmv.) about a Colorado cardiologist later convicted of rape, while Denver faced backlash after [hacked road signs flashed anti-car messages](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Jeffco Public Schools also warned of [up to 160 layoffs](https://link.email.joinrmv.) as it confronts a $60 million budget gap.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** President Trump [escalated the fight against fentanyl](https://link.email.joinrmv.) by designating it a weapon of mass destruction, dramatically increasing penalties and targeting cartels as a national-security threat.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Commentary today warns that ideological gatekeeping has [pushed men out of key institutions](https://link.email.joinrmv.), argues that [disarming law-abiding citizens](https://link.email.joinrmv.) gives violence time to spread, and exposes how [climate policy now drives Colorado governance](https://link.email.joinrmv.) through mandates and regulation rather than voter consent.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, December 17, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[What Xcel promised regulators and what customers were told before Dec. 17 shutoff warnings](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
Coloradans are being asked to prepare for the chance of a planned outage on Dec. 17. The company’s public alerts tell people to watch the map. The filings tell a fuller story about thresholds, timelines and who is supposed to be in the loop when a shutoff is on the table.
That framework was not created overnight. It was built through years of filings with the Colorado Public Utilities Commission (PUC) and formally approved in 2025. As of Dec. 16, the documents already on record allow for a clearer picture of what Xcel committed to regulators and what customers were actually told as the wind event approached.
Public Safety Power Shutoffs (PSPS) are not ad hoc emergency decisions. They are a state-approved operational program.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[How climate policy became the steering wheel of Colorado government](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SCOTT JAMES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Climate policy quietly replaced voter control with regulatory rule:** After voters rejected Proposition 112, lawmakers passed SB19-181 and HB19-1261 anyway—shifting power from voters to agencies and commissions and embedding climate mandates into nearly every arm of state government without another vote.
* **Greenhouse-gas targets became a master key for government control:** Statutory emissions goals now dictate energy, transportation, land use, building codes, air quality, and local planning, forcing agencies to bend policy toward climate compliance regardless of cost, feasibility, or local impact.
* **Rulemaking replaced transparency and local authority:** Instead of open debate, climate priorities were advanced through boards, roadmaps, technical standards, and dense regulations—shrinking local control, driving up costs, worsening congestion, and sidelining the voices of workers, farmers, and families.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Trump Blasts Polis as Weak and Pathetic Over Continued Imprisonment of Tina Peters](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Trump denounces Polis for keeping Tina Peters behind bars:** President Trump publicly blasted Gov. Jared Polis as “weak and pathetic” for continuing to imprison former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters after Trump announced a presidential pardon, framing her prosecution as punishment for demanding honest elections.
* **The case has become a national election-integrity flashpoint:** Trump’s remarks elevated Peters’ imprisonment from a state-level dispute to a national issue, fueling conservative concerns that election officials who challenge the system face harsh and selective punishment.
* **Colorado leadership accused of defying federal authority:** By refusing to release Peters despite Trump’s pardon announcement, Polis and state officials are portrayed as openly resisting federal action—intensifying scrutiny over whether political motives are driving Colorado’s handling of the case.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**When the State Disarms the Innocent, Violence Gets Time to Work**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 16** _What happened in Australia was not merely a criminal act. It was a demonstration. A hard, visual lesson about time, power, and responsibility. Dozens of videos show attackers firing openly while innocent people run, hide, and plead._
[**The Bill of Rights was written to limit power. One civics lesson explains how.**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 15** _Bill of Rights Day is often marked with references to free speech, due process and other familiar rights. Less attention is paid to the reason those protections exist at all: to place clear limits on government power._
[**Colorado’s quiet transformation leaves working communities behind**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY SCOTT JAMES | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 15** _I am sounding the alarm on the quiet erosion of Colorado’s values, warning of a top-down agenda that’s silencing everyday citizens. Not the Colorado of glossy tourism ads and climate conferences. The real Colorado._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
🕎 **DID YOU KNOW?** Harry Truman became the **first U.S. president to mark Hanukkah at the White House** , and in 1951 he accepted a menorah as a gift from Israeli Prime Minister David Ben-Gurion.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "The only way that has ever been discovered to have a lot of people cooperate together voluntarily is through the free market." – Milton Friedman
|
---

---|---|---
Did a friend forward you this email?
[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|

# US threatens EU tech retaliation after members target US firms
The Trump administration on Tuesday threatened to impose fees or restrictions on major European companies like Spotify and Siemens, accusing the EU of discriminatory taxes, fines and **[regulations targeting American tech giants.](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae76cfe-53a3-4a5a-b919-c4809a3c5507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae76cfe-53a3-4a5a-b919-c4809a3c5507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Targeted European firms:** Accenture, DHL, SAP, Amadeus, Capgemini, Publicis and Mistral AI are all seen as potential subjects for US countermeasures.
* **Section 301 probe:** The US has launched an investigation to investigate EU digital policies, enabling possible tariffs or service restrictions under US trade law.
* **National digital taxes:** In response to the targeting of US firms (Such as Elon Musk's "X" and also Google) with fines by countries like France, Italy, Austria, Spain and UK the US seeks to rebalance the playing field with retaliatory action.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18c42676-3796-4b78-b31a-61ce294979c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **EU defends rules:** The EU says the taxes are fair and non-discriminatory, emphasizing equal application and commitment to prior US trade agreements

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddebb7f-dd34-46f6-93a0-8b88f7940353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddebb7f-dd34-46f6-93a0-8b88f7940353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddebb7f-dd34-46f6-93a0-8b88f7940353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddebb7f-dd34-46f6-93a0-8b88f7940353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Big banks crush 2025 records, look for 2026 to be even better
America's largest banks are closing out 2025 at peak strength, with record-high stock prices, surging balance sheets and the most regulatory freedom in 15 years, **[fueling ambitious growth plans for 2026](https://substack.com/redirect/827f2014-0b37-4c12-a685-bf084a7ca9ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid wide-open capital markets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/827f2014-0b37-4c12-a685-bf084a7ca9ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record Stock Surge** : Major bank shares, including Bank of America surpassing its 2006 peak and JPMorgan at all-time highs, drove a 29% sector index gain outperforming the S&P 500.
* **Investment Banking Boom** : Merger momentum and market volatility propelled trading fees to expected records at most big banks, with global volumes hitting highest levels since 2021.
* **Expansion Plans Ahead** : Executives signaled 2026 empire-building, including Bank of America's push into cross-selling via adviser recruitment and branch growth.
* **Regulatory Tailwinds Support** : Unprecedented easing not seen in 15 years enables momentum, as resilient economies keep capital markets accessible despite uncertainties.

* * *
* * *
# Subprime auto loan execs charged with massive fraud
Federal prosecutors charged Tricolor Auto founder Daniel Chu and COO David Goodgame with **[orchestrating a years-long systematic fraud,](https://substack.com/redirect/844316be-abd6-4dbd-998d-31d9dd52568a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** allegedly double-pledging loan collateral and manipulating data to secure billions in funding before the subprime lender's September bankruptcy roiled Wall Street.
* **Double-Pledging Scheme Exposed** : Executives repeatedly pledged the same auto loans to multiple lenders simultaneously, inflating collateral values to obtain excessive financing.
* **Loan Data Manipulation Alleged** : Delinquent and charged-off loans were altered to appear eligible, deceiving banks and investors from 2018 through September 2025.
* **Banking Sector Shockwaves Felt** : Tricolor's collapse alongside First Brands triggered mid-October stock drops for Jefferies, Zions Bancorporation, and regional banks amid private credit fears.
* **Dimon Warns of Risks** : JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon called the failures signs of lax lending practices, quipping "when you see one cockroach, there are probably more."

## [Are Subprime auto loans the reboot of 2008 nobody asked for?](https://substack.com/redirect/d1219960-ef66-4d4c-a0b8-0f6e2d20b3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/profile/333697867-the-capitalist)| | *
---|---|---
| Oct 26
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d1219960-ef66-4d4c-a0b8-0f6e2d20b3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d1219960-ef66-4d4c-a0b8-0f6e2d20b3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d1219960-ef66-4d4c-a0b8-0f6e2d20b3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **Tesla stock surges to record on robotaxi buzz**
Tesla shares **[closed at a record $489.88 Tuesday,](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ef8c8b-f2cf-4ebb-816f-2fe3199dd16d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** soaring on investor excitement over Elon Musk's announcement of driverless robotaxi testing in Austin, Texas -- even as the company's electric vehicle sales continue to slump amid fierce competition and lost tax incentives.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ef8c8b-f2cf-4ebb-816f-2fe3199dd16d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Driverless tests advance rapidly:** Tesla is now testing vehicles with no occupants in Austin, nearly six months after starting a pilot with safety drivers, signaling progress toward unsupervised Full Self-Driving technology.
**EV deliveries plunge sharply:** The company reported a 13% drop in first-quarter deliveries and a 20% revenue decline, with U.S. sales hitting a four-year low in November due to competition and backlash against Musk.
**Analysts boost price targets:** Mizuho raised its Tesla target to $530 from $475, citing potential for faster robotaxi fleet expansion in Austin and San Francisco through FSD improvements.
**Market cap hits trillions:** The rally pushed Tesla's valuation to $1.63 trillion, ranking it the seventh-most valuable public company despite a roller-coaster year with earlier sharp declines.
* * *
* * *
# Amazon eyes massive OpenAI stake
OpenAI is in confidential discussions with Amazon for a **[potential investment exceeding $10 billion,](https://substack.com/redirect/f486e110-72e4-43ff-842c-da35a81ef0cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** coupled with an agreement to utilize Amazon's AI chips, as the ChatGPT creator diversifies partnerships following its recent restructuring.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f486e110-72e4-43ff-842c-da35a81ef0cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Post-restructuring freedom expands:** OpenAI's October shift ended Microsoft's exclusive compute rights, enabling broader capital raises and third-party collaborations in the AI ecosystem.
**Rivals attract big investments:** Amazon has poured at least $8 billion into Anthropic, while Microsoft and Nvidia plan up to $5 billion and $10 billion respectively in the OpenAI competitor.
**AWS chips gain traction:** Amazon's Trainium and Inferentia chips, developed since 2015 with the latest generation unveiled this month, position it to challenge Nvidia in AI training and inference.
**Infrastructure commitments soar:** OpenAI recently signed a $38 billion AWS cloud capacity deal and committed over $1.4 trillion total to chipmakers like Nvidia, AMD, and Broadcom amid massive compute demands.

name: GIFFORDS Team
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Sarah Ronda-Mendoza is a 2025 GIFFORDS fellow in El Paso, Texas
#

In 2018, GIFFORDS launched its Courage Fellowship program to empower young leaders in the fight to save lives from gun violence. Sarah Ronda-Mendoza is a 2025 GIFFORDS fellow in El Paso, Texas. Thank you for taking a moment to read her story.
* * *

Team,
From a young age, gun violence shaped the world around me. I remember doing drills in elementary school without fully understanding why we had to practice hiding under tables and staying silent.
I was a child when Sandy Hook happened and a teenager when the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas occurred. By then, I found myself wondering, “How much longer do I have until this hits home?”
In 2019, that fear reached my own city of El Paso, Texas when a shooter walked into a Walmart and killed 23 people.
Then, in 2021, it reached my family. My cousin Jacob, the boy I grew up with who felt more like a brother, was shot and killed in Tucson, Arizona.
Suddenly he became another headline. I remember leaving his funeral stunned at how everyone around me continued their day, while my world felt like it had collapsed.
In that moment, I finally understood the weight carried by thousands of other families. When the news cycle moved on, we were left with a grief that no one should ever have to endure.
Jacob was an EMT whose guiding principle was to serve others. Losing him made me want to do something that honored the life he lived.
**That is when I learned more about Gabby Giffords's story.** Her perseverance, her strength, and her willingness to transform her pain into action resonated deeply with me. An organization that not only supports survivors and their families, but also channels grief into meaningful advocacy is what drew me to GIFFORDS.
As a GIFFORDS Courage Fellow, I met other young people who shared my passion for gun violence prevention. We learned about current gun laws and the policies GIFFORDS is fighting for. Hearing the stories of others my age who had lived through similar experiences made me feel less alone. It reminded me that this movement is full of people carrying heavy losses and still choosing to fight for change.
I eventually held my own event on my college campus, speaking to students about the importance of gun safety. I went to school in a very conservative area, and I was surprised by how open people were to honest, respectful conversations about safe gun ownership and ending gun violence. It made me realize that my generation is not as divided as it may seem.
**Gun violence prevention is not an unpopular opinion. Its meaning has simply been muddled by politics. When we sit down and actually talk, there is much more common ground.**
Those conversations gave me hope, and they still do. I believe my generation will be the one loud enough and united enough to make our representatives listen when we say that enough is enough.
[**GIFFORDS PAC works to empower students like me to speak out and help save more lives from gun violence. If you are fired up to make a change, will you please make a contribution today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=1&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=20&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=21&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=22&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=23&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q42025.3xF0Vo&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=24&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=25&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)**
---
****
Thank you for standing alongside me and GIFFORDS.
Sarah Ronda-Mendoza
2025 GIFFORDS Fellow
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251217-1-b&t=26&akid=11112%2E3935704%2EWP7izC)

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Callie Fines, EMILYs List
subject: Your 2025 Membership Record >>
body:

Hi there \-- I’m Joe. 👋

I just joined Derek’s team as the new Finance Director, and I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and explain why this moment is so critical.

**[I’ve worked on races up and down the ballot -- and I can tell you with confidence that this race is uniquely important. Derek flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes in 2024 in one of the closest House wins in the country. That alone would make this seat a top Republican target, but with control of the House down to just a few seats, the national GOP is doubling down on flipping it back.

They’re already pouring money into the district and supporting formidable GOP challengers. Meanwhile, Derek’s refusing every cent from Big Oil and Big Pharma -- because he’s fighting for working families, not corporate donors.

**That’s where I come in -- and where you do too.**

It’s my job to make sure we hit every fundraising goal and stay ahead of the attacks. At the end of the month, we file our last public FEC report before the election year, and Republicans will be combing through every number we report.

**[Every dollar goes straight to on-the-ground voter outreach, and it all adds up in a race this close. Will you chip in $3 today to help protect this seat -- and everything we’ve fought for?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121472181/589567029/-1516755731?refcode=em-12.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI3MDEwMjEtNzhkYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IuB3VlLzYQGxAzVi3AwnWlg3wuRc8bsWcnhcERnkStw=)**

We’re staring down the FEC deadline, and right now, we’re not on track to hit our goal.

| | | To all of Hillary’s supporters,

We’re staring down the FEC deadline, and right now, we’re not on track to hit our goal.
---
| | Michigan is once again the center of the political universe — and the battle for the House majority will run straight through districts like ours.

Republican megadonors like the DeVos family know it, too. They’re already flooding Michigan with money because they believe they can buy back this seat and block the progress Hillary is fighting for every day.
---
| | Hillary is all in on taking back the House majority. She’s showing up, doing the work, and refusing to let extremism shape the future of our state. But grassroots support is what keeps this campaign moving — and that’s where you come in.
---

-Elizabeth Warren** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71097?t=4&akid=23741%2E4449941%2EuQKRrD) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71097?t=5&akid=23741%2E4449941%2EuQKRrD)

Here are the facts, team:

➡️ If the Electoral College didn’t exist, Hillary Clinton would have been elected President in 2016.

➡️➡️ **Donald Trump wouldn’t even be in the picture!!**

➡️➡️➡️ NOW – we have to deal with the consequences of the Electoral College system and make sure that we NEVER allow another unpopular candidate to be elected EVER. AGAIN.

But Trump’s MAGA Minions have already started fighting back to make sure that the Electoral College stays for good.

**_They know it’s their only hope at winning another Presidential election!_**

[We need to reach 20,000 SIGNATURES from EVERY STATE before 8AM TOMORROW if we want to be taken seriously. But we are still missing 12,294 signatures from your state!!!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71097?t=8&akid=23741%2E4449941%2EuQKRrD)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: This toss-up seat could flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Dear Peter,
I’m proud to support Jo Mendoza for Congress in Arizona’s 6th Congressional District.
Jo is a single mother, a 20-year Marine Corps veteran, and a lifelong Arizonan who grew up in a working-class Hispanic family in rural Arizona.
Jo served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan , leading in some of the most challenging environments imaginable. She knows what real leadership looks like, and she’s ready to bring that discipline, integrity, and courage to Congress.
But this race matters far beyond Arizona.
It is one of the most competitive races in the country , and flipping it is essential for Democrats to take back the House. Winning seats like this is how we protect democracy, defend working families, and stop extreme policies from moving our country backward.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-jo-mendoza-split?refcode=2051217 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-jo-mendoza-split?refcode=2051217]
Jo is running to prove to young people – especially girls who rarely see leaders who look like them – that they have the strength, the voice, and the power to dream big and lead boldly.
And when people ask whether a Latina Marine Corps veteran can flip a toss-up district and bring accountability to Congress, Jo has a simple answer: ¡Sí, se puede!
Will you rush to split a contribution between Jo Mendoza and my campaign before the end-of-quarter deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-jo-mendoza-split?refcode=2051217]
Your support today will help Jo reach every voter in AZ-06 and help move us one step closer to flipping the House.
This is how we make history – town by town, district by district, state by state.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-jo-mendoza-split?refcode=2051217]
Thank you for standing with Jo, with our veterans, and with the future of our democracy.
In solidarity,
Ro

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121473320/589571020/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRlNjM5ZS03YWRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4m-SQwASf2J1gazv9jFnRGTRG9O_ZqzSPFYrju2odqQ=)
Peter, Mark Kelly here.

They are escalating.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121473321/589571025/-156400434?refcode=em-12.17.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRlNjM5ZS03YWRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4m-SQwASf2J1gazv9jFnRGTRG9O_ZqzSPFYrju2odqQ=)
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.

Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.

Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.

body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.

Folks, Mark Kelly here.

They are escalating. The three-year licensing agreement will enable users to generate characters from Marvel, Star Wars, and Pixar using AI. But the real story today is the future of AI and IP, and [how much legacy studios will pay to get in](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskLuOnTAURb_GdCC_sE3hItIV3aRNaR3sAzgyBhlzUf4-YhLNF0y713lsrV8f7gNiinn5CRvaOu8uYIgeKgaX8T4T1orFQUAPAdOel4QLpDvmgm-E5Djlfct4y7Qbr5ReX9usCXZG5CgatEyrfhgMM7xZLTODErNRXBqqNUxmCsJMHqinBoHpJtrnKuNMs4Hyfugk9F4KOShpwABIIimGWPfS_d5jrivO6c_-xtL5fWuSXWs9TiJ-ED4SPt733WGaE0znw59QjFfd3LlfxSMRL9wgJsLVE24Y4rUR8ToghvaAUjOWc43Hf-5hOyAu-XPiCzJDW0m1-yfiyrGCE4NRUnHZc9MUG447phRPpYmky_Pws2z9Zudvy_8GAAD__ytQnJs). Universal buys DreamWorks for **$1 billion**. Now Disney invests **$1 billion **into OpenAI. It's like a poker game where the minimum buy-in is the GDP of a small island nation. But the game is now changing. While Hollywood giants scramble for their place in the AI future, [one $6 billion IP powerhouse team](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskLuOnTAURb_GdCC_sE3hItIV3aRNaR3sAzgyBhlzUf4-YhLNF0y713lsrV8f7gNiinn5CRvaOu8uYIgeKgaX8T4T1orFQUAPAdOel4QLpDvmgm-E5Djlfct4y7Qbr5ReX9usCXZG5CgatEyrfhgMM7xZLTODErNRXBqqNUxmCsJMHqinBoHpJtrnKuNMs4Hyfugk9F4KOShpwABIIimGWPfS_d5jrivO6c_-xtL5fWuSXWs9TiJ-ED4SPt733WGaE0znw59QjFfd3LlfxSMRL9wgJsLVE24Y4rUR8ToghvaAUjOWc43Hf-5hOyAu-XPiCzJDW0m1-yfiyrGCE4NRUnHZc9MUG447phRPpYmky_Pws2z9Zudvy_8GAAD__ytQnJs) already owns over 500 trademarks and copyrights, including iconic characters such as **Cinderella, Snow White, Pinocchio, Peter Pan, Rapunzel, and many more**. subject: Hegseth blocking release of boat attack video. Don't take this crap, demand he let America see it!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand the release of the FULL boat attack video! (UPDATE: Hegseth now saying he won't do it)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5250d828-ec56-4a0a-9932-36f066115d62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40df96b9-0641-4bcf-9ed7-fe30de240e38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(After you take this action,[discuss it](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbafcbfee-b131-4af5-bd8a-645e41770480/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and come see others on on [our new Substack page](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4eb854a-887d-429c-9fdc-fb2bbba433e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! Thanks to the [30,000+](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf829a938-7b30-4aea-8cd7-b9fd5a16809c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) there!)_ _(UPDATE: No surprise, Trump and [Hegseth](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1a5ef5f-696b-4579-9670-a1c0350e78f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) now backtracking on release, in spite of earlier promise, and in spite of the ****ing law passed by Congress! We need massive pressure. If you’ve already taken this action, get others to do it too. If you’ve not taken it,[ please do so now](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9ab1566-3d01-43f4-bdbd-3063d510bcbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Numbers matter, and we can make this happen!)_ Those who have seen the boat attack video describe a scene of horror, and a needless attack on the helpless survivors that was either a war crime or murder. **Except for Congressional Republicans, that is, who have come up with absurd excuses and obvious lies to defend Trump and Hegseth.** There’s a simple way to find out what the truth is —[release the video and let America see it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T048c8c9f-5073-405e-a658-878c09fa80a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). The FULL video, not an artfully edited portion. **[Add your name: Tell Trump to Release the FULL Video of the Boat Attack NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T774964e2-0ca5-4f63-8a4d-8c048531bf4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
