clean_body: Bezos is quietly replacing warehouse crews as we speak.| | | | December 17 | | | | | Elon’s Bots Just Took Out the Trash — What’s Next? | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. body:

name: Team Cooper
subject: Are you seeing these toy prices? 😳
body:
Trump tariff chaos is even coming after Tonka trucks and Legos.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)
Have you gone toy shopping recently, Peter? If so, you've probably noticed: Toys are a LOT more expensive this year. A classic steel Tonka truck that cost $25 two years ago now costs $40. That’s an increase of 60% in two years — and Legos, Barbies, and other popular toys have all jumped in price, too. _All because of Trump's tariffs._ About 8 out of every 10 toys sold in the U.S. are manufactured in China, and his tariffs on Chinese imports have driven prices through the roof. **Working families were already struggling _before_ Trump made holiday gift-giving more expensive, and now this.** **[We want to hear from you, Peter: Do you want North Carolina’s next Senator to stand up to Trump and fight to bring down costs for families?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=7&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)** | [YES](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=8&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq) | [NO](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=9&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)
---|---
Folks are dealing with rising grocery bills, higher housing costs, and stagnant wages. Now they're facing sticker shock at the toy store because of reckless tariff policies that hurt everyday Americans? While Trump's billionaire friends get _richer?_
Unacceptable. Peter, Roy Cooper knows what it's like for families trying to make ends meet. As Governor, he fought to expand Medicaid, bring down health care costs, and invest in good-paying jobs.
**That’s why Roy is running for the U.S. Senate: because he believes Washington should work to make life MORE affordable for working people, not _less_.**
**[So tell us where you stand, Peter: Is it important for North Carolina’s next Senator to fight to lower costs for working Americans?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=10&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)**
[YES](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=11&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq) | [NO](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/PET_ToyPrices_121725?source=em_RC_PET_ToyPrices_121725&t=12&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)
---|---
Thanks,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=185%2E124072%2EinCxlq)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Donald Trump attacked me personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Here’s what he said:| | |
---
| | Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day. _And last week, he directed one at me._ Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people. Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too. [**I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Zoe Lofgren****of whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121486299/589615064/-1297003487?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-17_RYC_DDT_ES-37701&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQxYjVkNi1hM2RiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6OY3VsB31Hp5FYrS_uoTp2SYFzHoA_5UScH_8VNDh8=) So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me. He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_ **If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.** You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me. [**I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. Split a donation between our campaign and Zoe Lofgren****if you can, and help me take on Trump and the national GOP.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121486300/589615065/-1297003487?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-17_RYC_DDT_ES-37701&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQxYjVkNi1hM2RiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6OY3VsB31Hp5FYrS_uoTp2SYFzHoA_5UScH_8VNDh8=)
